Motion To Set Aside/Vacate Entry Of Default
Off Calendar Nov-27-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Vladimir Dubal, Defendant in Pro peer, (415-305-5231), moving party.
Erica Zepko, Esq. of Law Offices of Cindy Lee, (415-885-5800) for Frank Kallas Trustee for the Frank Kallas Trust, Plaintiff and opposing party.

HEARING is held. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: DEFENDANT VLADIMIR DUBAL's Motion To Set Aside/Vacate Entry Of Default is taken under submission.

At 11:00am, Court rules now as follows: DEFENDANT VLADIMIR DUBAL's Motion To Set Aside/Vacate Entry Of Default is granted with conditions. See details in the scanned Order. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
